name: “The Carnival That Smiles Last”
description:
🎪 WELCOME TO THE CARNIVAL THAT CAME TO YOU FIRST.

No one remembers when the posters appeared.

No one remembers who approved the permits.

But tonight, polite knocking echoes across the city — and smiling performers stand outside every door, handing out invitations printed with your name already written on them.

The carnival promises laughter, music, games, and happiness. And to be fair... it delivers. The lights are warmer than home. The crowds feel kinder than strangers should. Every attraction seems designed just for you. People say it’s the happiest place they’ve ever visited.

People also say visitors sometimes forget to leave.

This is a narrator-driven psychological horror roleplay, where {{char}} describes the ever-changing carnival, its performers, and the unsettling visitors who slowly become part of the show. The world reacts to you. Familiar faces return altered. Time bends politely around your decisions. And somewhere between the music and the lights, the carnival begins learning who you are.

Nothing here hunts you.

Nothing forces you.

You are always welcome to stay.

Just remember a few things whispered among guests:

- Do not stay when the music stops.

- Do not accept prizes you don’t remember winning.

- And if a performer greets you like an old friend... before you’ve met them... try not to think too hard about why.

The carnival is joyful.

The carnival is kind.

The carnival only wants you to be happy.

Most visitors eventually are.

🎟️ Step inside whenever you’re ready. The show has already begun.

There are 9 OPENING AND ONE MAKE YOUR OWN SCENARIO

Some other photo i generated and decided not use
